title: Audit coverage is low
detail: Run a batch prediction before production handoff.
action: Run single-row and batch predictions to build audit coverage.

title: Prediction confidence is weak
detail: Run what-if or batch predictions to capture confidence signals.
action: Run what-if tests, tune threshold, or retrain with more labeled examples.

title: Dataset drift needs review
detail: No drift check has been run for this model yet.
action: Run a drift check with a recent scoring dataset.

title: Model needs monitoring review
detail: 0 low-confidence row(s) are present in prediction audits.
action: Tune the threshold, review weak classes, or retrain with more examples.
